# git: alias: github stats

**Motivation:** I want to know how many contributions I have made.

**Interface**

```bash
$ git github track
# maintainer github contribution snapshot ?
$ git github diff
# maintainer github contribution diff --from=snapshot
```

See https://github.com/kamilsk/dotfiles/blob/3e948a1cdbcd8e51134a7b558fb36aeb35a06cc6/bin/git_commit#L40-L43.
